posts.author: Streak
posts.text: Meet the New Streak (Beta) — The team is currently focused on improving the new Streak app. While we can’t share a timeline yet, please be assured that your feedback has been noted for future updates.

posts.author: _Raghavendr
posts.text: Meet the New Streak (Beta) — App came but when can we expect futures added to scanner? And also no option to customise alerts if possible pleased add Run now button in alerts so we can get results wuthout waiting for alert to trigger

posts.author: Streak
posts.text: Meet the New Streak (Beta) — Hi @Aravind7 Thank you for the feedback. Your suggestion has been noted and shared with the concerned team for review and consideration in future updates.

posts.author: Aravind7
posts.text: Meet the New Streak (Beta) — In equity backtesting brokerage is not available for cumulative p&L, it shows brokerage only for individual stocks. please add that as it is very essential in developing a strategy.
